10100111111100010001111010000001011011001001001101010101 - ASI: 24

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  010 = 0 * 10
  100 = 1 * 00
  0101 = 010 * 1
  1100 = 11 * 00
  1111 = 11 * 11
  01000 = 010 * 00
  10011 = 100 * 11
  010110 = 0101 * 10
  1010011 = 10 * 10011
  1100100 = 1100 * 100
  1111100 = 1111 * 100
  00010110 = 00 * 010110
  01010101 = 0101 * 0101
  111101000 = 1111 * 01000
  1001101010101 = 10011 * 01010101
  01000111101000 = 01000 * 111101000
  10100111111100 = 1010011 * 1111100
  000101101100100 = 00010110 * 1100100
  0001011011001001001101010101 = 000101101100100 * 1001101010101
  1010011111110001000111101000 = 10100111111100 * 01000111101000
  10100111111100010001111010000001011011001001001101010101 = 1010011111110001000111101000 * 0001011011001001001101010101
